hooks.command:
python -c "
import sys, json, os, subprocess
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
file_path = (data.get('tool_input') or {}).get('file_path') or (data.get('tool_response') or {}).get('filePath') or ''
if not file_path:
    sys.exit(0)
norm = file_path.replace(chr(92), '/')
project = 'D:/claude'
if not norm.lower().startswith(project.lower() + '/') and norm.lower() != project.lower():
    sys.exit(0)
basename = os.path.basename(norm)
os.chdir(project)
subprocess.run(['git', 'add', '-A'], check=True)
result = subprocess.run(['git', 'diff', '--cached', '--quiet'])
if result.returncode == 0:
    sys.exit(0)
subprocess.run(['git', 'commit', '-m', 'auto: update ' + basename], check=True)
subprocess.run(['git', 'push', 'origin', 'main'], check=True)
" 2>/dev/null || true
